title: Tests, Examples, Fuzzing, Benchmarks, Coverage, and Static Analysis · Language Lens: Table Subtests
summary: A parser passes familiar examples but fails malformed UTF-8, aliases caller memory, and regresses under a dependency update. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go table subtests increment in a layered parser quality dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write table-driven tests and subtests whose names, fixtures, assertions, and changed cases expose the failed contract.
Use range-over-function iteration and evaluate Go 1.26 self-referential constraints while preserving cancellation and readability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
